out_of_scope_note: Out of scope: large-scale behavioral study of LLM persuasiveness on political issues. Pure AI/social-science paper evaluating post-training, prompting, personalization, and scale effects on human belief change — no neural recording, no computational model of the brain, no perceptual/decision-making mechanism. Matches the preprint version (canonical_id 9404b577) and is excluded for the same reason.
